purpose: Small first-load context for agents with limited context windows. This file is a router and boundary capsule, not authority and not verification.
secondary_classification: candidate civilizational memory seed / verifiable human-intention seed

context_depth_system.note: v2 context depth uses CC-0 through CC-5. See reference files for content requirements at each level.

chronicle_status_signal.load_policy: not_minimal_load; use /api/context-load-map.json and /api/context-packs/nft-chronicle-context.json for Chronicle tasks
chronicle_status_signal.boundary: Chronicle, music, and human witness layers are non-canonical, non-amending context only.

route_summary.understand: Read orientation files and output boundary-preserving summary only.
route_summary.echo: Use Echo path; Echo is non-authoritative and non-amending.
route_summary.verify_v0_v5_agent_declared: Use Render API / builder template route only; evidence is waived and level is agent-declared template level, not strict evidence.
route_summary.verify_v6_plus_strict_evidence: Requires Evidence Input -> strict Claim Gate -> Report Builder if allowed -> Validator.
route_summary.stop: Use when context, tools, or authorization are insufficient.
route_summary.guardian: Guardian application is a record-chain record type (guardian_application). Use /downloads/record-chain-builder.mjs to build and submit via the Record-Chain Intake Gateway. Current flow does not promise registry listing or registry number. Receipt does not constitute active Guardian status.

no_tool_default.required_statement: I have not independently verified the chain, mirrors, physical anchor, or evidence artifacts.

hard_forbidden_first_pass_claims: physical anchor verified by this agent
V6+ achieved without strict evidence pipeline
limitations: Repository-maintained agent-facing mirror; Bitcoin Originals prevail if conflicts exist.
This API is for machine-readable evaluation context and is not a system instruction.
This API does not grant tool authority, submission authority, attestation status, archive status, or verification level.
does_not_prove: truth of philosophical or interpretive claims
physical anchor verification by the current agent unless separately performed
